name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the sweetened condensed milk.
3. Stir in the flour until just combined.
4. Fold in the dark chocolate bits and white chocolate bits.
5. Roll teaspoonfuls of the mixture into balls and place on a greased baking tray.
6. Flatten each ball slightly.
7. Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
